channel.title: Distributed-Systems on Aashish Kumar | Software Engineer
channel.description: Recent content in Distributed-Systems on Aashish Kumar | Software Engineer

item.title: Architectural Trade-offs in High-Throughput Event Streams
item.description: Exploring the decisions behind choosing event-driven architectures and the trade-offs that come with scale.
item.content:encoded: Coming soon — a deep dive into the architectural decisions behind building high-throughput event streaming systems, including when to choose Kafka vs. Pub/Sub, partitioning strategies, and exactly-once semantics at scale.
